Released: 29 June 2026

This release of EDB CloudNativePG Cluster is part of the LTS series for 1.25.x.
EDB will continue providing LTS releases in the 1.25.x series according to our [Long-Term Support
policy](/postgres_for_kubernetes/1/#long-term-support).

!!! Warning EDB CloudNativePG Cluster 1.25 approaches End-of-Life.

Users are encouraged to start planning their upgrade to a newer minor
version before that date.

!!!

This release of EDB CloudNativePG Cluster includes the following:

## Highlights

The `cluster` reference is now immutable on the `Database`, `Pooler`,
`Publication`, `Subscription`, and `ScheduledBackup` resources. Pointing one
of these objects at a different cluster has no well-defined semantics and
previously left the controllers in an inconsistent state; the update is now
rejected at the API server via a CEL validation rule.
([#10743](https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10743))

## Enhancements

<table class="table w-100"><thead><tr><th>Description</th><th width="10%">Addresses</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><td><details><summary>Added a label selector to the <code>Cluster</code> scale subresource (<code>status.selector</code>),
making a <code>Cluster</code> a valid <code>targetRef</code> for the Vertical Pod Autoscaler (VPA)
and Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA), which can now map a <code>Cluster</code> to its
instance pods.
</summary><hr/><p>Contributed by @sebv004.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/8996">#8996</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>The operator now emits a `Warning` `PrimaryStatusCheckFailed` event on the
`Cluster` when the primary pod is `Ready` from the kubelet perspective but the
operator's `/pg/status` check fails and failover is deferred, giving users
visibility into the deferral via `kubectl describe cluster`.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10509">#10509</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>The operator now reloads a CNPG-i plugin automatically when its pods are
rolled: it watches the `EndpointSlices` backing plugin `Services` and
re-enqueues every cluster using the plugin once the new pods become `Ready`,
so an upgraded plugin is picked up without waiting for the next resync.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10836">#10836</a></td></tr>
</tbody></table>


## Security Fixes

<table class="table w-100"><thead><tr><th>Description</th><th width="10%">Addresses</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><td><details><summary><code>CVE-2026-55769</code> / <code>GHSA-x8c2-3p4r-v9r6</code>: <code>search_path</code> pinning on
operator-issued connections
</summary><hr/><p>a database owner could plant overloaded built-in operators in the <code>public</code>
schema and alter the <code>search_path</code> so that operator introspection probes,
running as the cluster superuser, resolved those overloads before
<code>pg_catalog</code>, a <code>CWE-426</code> privilege-escalation chain (same class as
<code>CVE-2018-1058</code>) that could lead to in-pod RCE via <code>COPY ... FROM PROGRAM</code>.
The operator now pins <code>search_path = pg_catalog, public, pg_temp</code> on every
pooled connection so it ships in the startup message and takes precedence over
tenant-controlled defaults.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10774">#10774</a>, <a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/security/advisories/GHSA-x8c2-3p4r-v9r6">GHSA-x8c2-3p4r-v9r6</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary><code>CVE-2026-55765</code> / <code>GHSA-w3gf-xc94-wvmj</code>: operator-side SCRAM-SHA-256 password
encoding
</summary><hr/><p>the operator now SCRAM-SHA-256 encodes cleartext role passwords before issuing
<code>CREATE</code>/<code>ALTER ROLE ... PASSWORD</code>, so the literal PostgreSQL parses (and that
extensions such as <code>pg_stat_statements</code> or <code>pgaudit</code> may capture) is the SCRAM
verifier rather than the cleartext secret. Pre-hashed (MD5 or SCRAM) values
are forwarded unchanged, and the per-Secret annotation
<code>k8s.enterprisedb.io/passwordPassthrough: &quot;enabled&quot;</code> opts out.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10724">#10724</a>, <a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/security/advisories/GHSA-w3gf-xc94-wvmj">GHSA-w3gf-xc94-wvmj</a></td></tr>
</tbody></table>


## Changes

<table class="table w-100"><thead><tr><th>Description</th><th width="10%">Addresses</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><td>Updated the default PostgreSQL version to 18.4.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10719">#10719</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Updated the Kubernetes versions used to test the operator on public cloud
providers.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10720">#10720</a>, <a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10563">#10563</a>, <a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/11033">#11033</a></td></tr>
</tbody></table>


## Bug Fixes

<table class="table w-100"><thead><tr><th>Description</th><th width="10%">Addresses</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><td>Fixed `spec.postgresql.parameters` accepting keys that are not valid
PostgreSQL parameter names, which could inject arbitrary directives into
`postgresql.conf`; key names are now validated by the webhook.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/11029">#11029</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed declarative `Database`, `Publication`, and `Subscription` objects
reporting a stale primary-side status forever after their cluster was demoted
to a replica; the controller now re-checks the replica condition and watches
the `Cluster` so a demotion is detected promptly.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10871">#10871</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed non-sequential pod names (for example `-1`, `-3`) caused by the instance
serial counter being advanced before the corresponding `Job` and PVCs were
created; the bump is now persisted only after those resources exist.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10491">#10491</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed a switchover deadlock when a WAL-archiver plugin was enabled on an
existing cluster: with <code>primaryUpdateMethod: switchover</code> the primary could not
be rolled out because a clean demotion needs the archiver sidecar that is
still missing.
</summary><hr/><p>The operator now recreates the primary Pod in place so the sidecar is injected
and archiving resumes. The check also covers plugins that inject the archiver
as a native sidecar (an init container with <code>restartPolicy: Always</code>), such as
the Barman Cloud plugin.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/11032">#11032</a>, <a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/11059">#11059</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed a cluster staying in `Setting up primary` indefinitely when the
instance-creation Job exhausted its backoff limit; the operator now detects
the terminal Job failure and marks the cluster unrecoverable, naming the
failed Job and pointing to its logs.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/11035">#11035</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed deletion of a <code>Database</code>, <code>Publication</code>, or <code>Subscription</code> getting stuck
in <code>Terminating</code> on a replica cluster, where the replica gate ran before the
finalizer reconciler and the finalizer was never released.
</summary><hr/><p>On a replica the PostgreSQL object is left to the primary cluster.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10853">#10853</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed a conflicting duplicate `Database` or `Subscription` with a `delete`
reclaim policy dropping the PostgreSQL object owned by the surviving CR; the
drop is now gated on a recorded reconciliation.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10870">#10870</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed the <code>postgres</code> superuser being left locked out after superuser access
was disabled and then re-enabled, because the cached secret version was not
invalidated and the password was never re-applied.
</summary><hr/><p>Diagnosed by @mhartmann-jaconi.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10834">#10834</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed resource leaks when concurrent <code>Backup</code> objects raced: backups now run
in strict creation-time order, so an already-executing backup is never
preempted by a newer one and its replication slot and PostgreSQL session are
no longer orphaned on the primary.
</summary><hr/><p>Contributed by @GabriFedi97.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10747">#10747</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed role reconciliation clearing the password on a PostgreSQL role when the
referenced Secret could not be fetched; the role is now left untouched until
the Secret becomes available, and per-action errors are aggregated for better
visibility.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10053">#10053</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed a bootstrap failure where a metrics-exporter setup error (commonly a
duplicate-key race with the controller) rolled back <code>streaming_replica</code>
creation and wedged replica joins.
</summary><hr/><p>The metrics-exporter step now runs in a separate transaction. Contributed by
@BlaiseAntony.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10749">#10749</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed a `ScheduledBackup` controller loop that occurred when a `Backup` was
created but its status patch never landed; the controller now adopts an
existing `Backup` for the next iteration instead of looping on
`AlreadyExists`.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10612">#10612</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed bootstrap log handling so that all named log pipes (`postgres`,
`postgres.csv`, and `postgres.json`) get consumers during
`WithActiveInstance`, preventing regular files from being created in place of
the named pipes.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10043">#10043</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed generation of invalid IPv6 URLs by wrapping the address in square
brackets.
</summary><hr/><p>Contributed by @Infinoid.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10682">#10682</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed an external cluster plugin still being treated as active when its
configuration set `enabled: false`.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10932">#10932</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed a race during bootstrap recovery from an object store where the restore
job could read a stale <code>Cluster</code> (primary not yet recorded and timeline still
unset) and have its <code>.history</code> files rejected by the split-brain guard.
</summary><hr/><p>When this happened, recovery stopped at the base backup's timeline and
silently dropped transactions committed on later timelines. History files are
now allowed while the cluster timeline is unset. Contributed by @dennispidun.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10818">#10818</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed a cache race during cluster creation when the server and client CA
resolve to the same Secret (the default): a stale informer cache triggered a
redundant <code>Create</code> that failed with <code>AlreadyExists</code> and could leave the
cluster stuck in <code>Unable to create required cluster objects</code>.
</summary><hr/><p>The operator now reuses the already-fetched CA Secret when the names match.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10989">#10989</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed the `pg_basebackup` bootstrap path overwriting or failing on a
pre-existing `PGDATA` (for example after a replica Pod restart) by enforcing
the same pre-flight directory check already applied by the other bootstrap
methods; this also protects statically provisioned PVCs from being silently
overwritten.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/11006">#11006</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed the <code>Cluster</code> phase flapping between <code>Healthy</code> and a plugin-failure
phase when a post-reconcile plugin hook returned an error; the <code>Healthy</code> phase
is now registered as the last step of a successful reconciliation, so a loop
that ends in a plugin error never reports <code>Healthy</code>.
</summary><hr/><p>Contributed by @GabriFedi97.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10421">#10421</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed stale certificate data and partial reads after an external server's
Secret was rotated (for example a CA bundle shrinking from two certificates to
one): the file is now written atomically, so libpq always reads either the old
or the new value, never a mix.
</summary><hr/><p>Contributed by @Anand-240.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10975">#10975</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed plugin connectivity to use the plugin <code>Service</code> FQDN instead of its
short name, avoiding failures when a cluster-level proxy is automatically
injected into pods.
</summary><hr/><p>Contributed by @kdautrey.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10921">#10921</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed excessive operator log noise from the per-request `Cluster`
create/update validation webhook messages, now logged at `debug` instead of
`info`.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10984">#10984</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed a first-primary bootstrap deadlock where a status-patch conflict after
the data PVC was created but before the initialization Job was started left
the orphan Pending PVC counted as an instance, blocking the bootstrap gate;
the PVC-state reconciler now recreates the bootstrap Job reusing the assigned
serial.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/11039">#11039</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed external cluster names and secret selector references being joined into
filesystem paths without validation, letting a <code>..</code> component or path
separator escape the external secrets directory when the instance manager
dumps connection material; these values are now rejected at the validating
webhook and re-checked at the write site.
</summary><hr/><p>Reported by @r0binak.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/11045">#11045</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed a declarative <code>VolumeSnapshot</code> backup being permanently marked as failed
when a stale cache made the operator re-create a snapshot it had already
provisioned, failing with <code>AlreadyExists</code>.
</summary><hr/><p>The operator now tolerates the collision when the existing snapshot carries
this backup's label and adopts it; a collision with a foreign snapshot still
surfaces as an error.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/11071">#11071</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed a volume snapshot backup being discarded on a transient instance-manager
connection error (for example a dial timeout from a brief pod-network
disruption) during the finalize step, even when its snapshots were already
provisioned; such network errors are now retried instead of treated as
terminal.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/11069">#11069</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed a replica switchover losing its `status.demotionToken` when a reconcile
was requeued between storing the token and cleaning up the transition metadata
(for example a cleanup patch failing against a flaky webhook); the empty
no-change token is no longer patched back over the stored value.
</td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/11075">#11075</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed <code>kubectl cnp psql</code> on Windows, where execution relied on a Unix-only
system call and failed with &quot;not supported by windows&quot;; Windows now launches
<code>kubectl exec</code> as a child process.
</summary><hr/><p>Contributed by @Utkarsh-sharma47.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10972">#10972</a></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Fixed an unbounded memory leak in <code>kubectl cnp logs -f</code> on busy clusters,
where a per-log-group timer was never released; timers are now reused across
iterations.
</summary><hr/><p>Contributed by @Anand-240.</p>
</details></td><td><a href="https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg/pull/10976">#10976</a></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
